---
name: Vocabulary or feature proposal
about: Propose a new domain, value, evidence type, source type, or feature
title: "[Proposal] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you propose

Describe the addition or change you are suggesting.

## Why

What real deployment need or regulatory requirement does this address? Cite sources where possible (papers, deployment experience, regulation text).

## Backward compatibility

Does this preserve backward compatibility with v1.0? If it requires breaking changes, explain why they are needed.

## Affected parts

Which parts of the standard would change:

- [ ] Domain vocabulary
- [ ] Scope / Reversibility / Time
- [ ] Schwartz value vocabulary
- [ ] Evidence type vocabulary
- [ ] Source type vocabulary
- [ ] Output mode / format
- [ ] Tools
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other: 

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is this one better?
